name: Walnut Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. Toast the whole wheat flour in a small dry frying pan over medium heat, stirring often until it is evenly darkened and light brown.
2. Transfer the toasted flour to a blender.
3. Add the walnuts, liquid aminos, lemon juice, garlic, black pepper, and 1/2 cup of vegetable stock to the blender. Blend until smooth.
4. Add the remaining 1 1/2 cups of vegetable stock to the blender and blend again until smooth.
5. Pour the mixture into a medium saucepan.
6. Bring to a simmer over low heat, stirring often until thickened, about 2 minutes.
7. Serve hot. This was developed especially for zucchini boats but is also good over brown rice, potatoes, and vegetables.
